name: Embroidered Red Kurta with Sherwani
description: Red kurta paired with a heavily embroidered sherwani jacket, perfect for wedding functions.
stylistNotes: Pair with beige churidar and traditional jootis.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in garment bag.

name: Mint Green Nehru Jacket Set
description: Classic cream kurta and churidar set with mint green Nehru jacket.
stylistNotes: Ideal for daytime events like Haldi or Engagement.
materialCare: Hand wash cold or dry clean.

name: Golden Yellow Mirror Sherwani
description: Bright yellow sherwani with mirror and sequin embellishments.
stylistNotes: Best suited for Haldi ceremony or groom outfit.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Handle with care.

name: Ivory Embellished Kurta Pant
description: Ivory kurta with subtle embellishments and matching dhoti pants.
stylistNotes: Suits traditional weddings and pooja ceremonies.

name: Mirror Work Red Kurta Dhoti Set
description: Elegant red kurta with mirror work detailing, paired with off-white dhoti pants.
stylistNotes: Perfect for reception night or sangeet functions.
materialCare: Steam press only. Avoid direct sunlight.
